## Editing.FieldValidator.number() method

Create a number field validator. Checks that value is a valid number within optional range.

**Signature:**

```typescript
static number<T, K extends keyof T>(fieldName: K, options?: {
        min?: number;
        max?: number;
        positive?: boolean;
    }): FieldValidator<T, K>;
```
